Interface ICircuitSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a network circuit source.

[Guid("9DFF4CFA-357F-4B1F-90A9-49C8301F896A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICircuitSource : IUtilityNetworkSource, INetworkSource
